name: Baidu (Qianfan)
steps: Complete real-name authentication on Baidu Cloud Console
Activate the Qianfan ModelBuilder service (千帆大模型平台)
Go to IAM > API Key page
Click "Create API Key" — select Qianfan ModelBuilder as the associated service
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: Free tier: ERNIE Speed/Lite series permanently free (10000 RPM, 800K TPM). Requires real-name auth and Qianfan service activation.
